$schema: Feature Card output schema for Phase 2 gap detection

title.description: Short descriptive title, e.g. 'Palm Beach County Assessor API Connector'

description.description: What the gap is and why it matters

impact.description: 1-10: How much does this gap limit research quality?

frequency.description: 1-10: How many zones will hit this same gap?

effort_inverse.description: 1-10: How easy is this to build? (10 = afternoon task)

schema_impact.description: New tables, columns, or migrations needed

lineage_note.description: e.g. 'Identified during 2026-03-22 rotation into wpb-downtown because we could not pull county assessor comps programmatically'
